steps.title: Use parallel condition to find r
steps.content:
Since parallel lines have equal slopes:

Line $j$: $3x + 4y = 28$ has slope $-\frac{3}{4}$
Line $k$: $24x + ry = 24$ has slope $-\frac{24}{r}$

Setting slopes equal:
$$-\frac{3}{4} = -\frac{24}{r}$$
$$\frac{3}{4} = \frac{24}{r}$$
$$3r = 96$$
$$r = 32$$

steps.title: Substitute (0, b) to find b
steps.content:
Line $k$ is $24x + 32y = 24$. Since it passes through $(0, b)$:
$$24(0) + 32b = 24$$
$$32b = 24$$
$$b = \frac{24}{32} = \frac{3}{4}$$
Therefore $b = \frac{3}{4}$ or $0.75$.
The answer is 0.75,3/4.
